StructUI full registry export for LLM consumption.
Canonical package: struct-ui
Canonical CLI: npx strui
Site: https://structui.com
GitHub: https://github.com/structui/structui

## 3D Pin
- id: 3d-pin
- slug: 3d-pin
- category: Advanced
- status: stable
- docsStatus: draft
- sourcePath: src/components/ui/3d-pin.tsx
- sourceExport: PinContainer
- tags: n/a
- related: n/a
- summary: 3D Pin: Interactive 3D hover card for standout links and showcases.
- description: Interactive 3D hover card for standout links and showcases.

## Accordion
- id: accordion
- slug: accordion
- category: Data Display
- status: stable
- docsStatus: ready
- sourcePath: src/components/ui/accordion.tsx
- sourceExport: Accordion
- tags: collapse, faq, disclosure, content
- related: button
- summary: Use Accordion for FAQs, settings panels, and dense content sections. Supports single or multiple expanded items and keyboard navigation.
- description: Collapsible sections for progressively revealing content.

Markdown documentation:
# Accordion

Use Accordion when content should stay compact until the user asks for more detail.

## Usage

- Group FAQs, settings, or help content.
- Choose single mode for focused reading.
- Choose multiple mode for comparison-heavy content.

## Accessibility

- Supports keyboard navigation.
- Follows the WAI-ARIA accordion pattern through Radix primitives.

## Badge
- id: badge
- slug: badge
- category: General
- status: stable
- docsStatus: ready
- sourcePath: src/components/ui/badge.tsx
- sourceExport: Badge
- tags: status, label, metadata, pill
- related: button
- summary: Use Badge to communicate status, category, or small metadata labels. Suitable for filters, labels, and inline semantic emphasis.
- description: Compact status indicator for labels, states, and metadata.

Markdown documentation:
# Badge

Use Badge for lightweight status labels, metadata chips, and inline semantic markers.

## Usage

- Show status such as active, beta, or archived.
- Pair with cards, filters, or table cells.
- Keep the label short for better scannability.

## Accessibility

- Keep text meaningful without relying on color alone.
- Use sufficient contrast for status variants.

- description: Editorial grid layout for feature sections and dashboards.

- tags: n/a
- related: n/a
- summary: Breadcrumbs: Hierarchy-based navigation trail for nested pages.
- description: Hierarchy-based navigation trail for nested pages.

## Button
- id: button
- slug: button
- category: General
- status: stable
- docsStatus: ready
- sourcePath: src/components/ui/button.tsx
- sourceExport: Button
- tags: action, trigger, form, cta
- related: badge, accordion
- summary: Use Button for primary and secondary actions. Supports variants, sizes, icons, loading states, and polymorphic rendering via asChild.
- description: Interactive button with multiple variants and sizes.

Markdown documentation:
# Button

Use Button for primary and secondary actions across forms, dialogs, and page-level calls to action.

## Usage

- Trigger an action or submit a form.
- Pick a variant to communicate hierarchy.
- Prefer concise labels and optional leading icons.

## Accessibility

- Preserves keyboard focus styles.
- Works with semantic button behavior by default.
- Supports accessible polymorphism through `asChild` when needed.
